layout_description: The Violet Gym has an S-shaped elevated platform structure.
The gym floor is otherwise flat/walkable.
Two statues flank the entrance area at the south.
The path winds from the south entrance up and around to reach Falkner at the north.
Bird Keeper Rod stands on the upper-right platform section (x=7, y=6).
Bird Keeper Abe stands on the lower-left platform section (x=2, y=10).
Gym Guide stands near entrance at south (x=7, y=13).
Two gym statues (bg_events) at x=3,y=13 and x=6,y=13.
Falkner stands at the top center of the map (x=5, y=1).
platform_notes: Row 1: Falkner at x=5 (leader position, top of S)
Rows 1-3: Upper platform segment (north arm of S)
Rows 3-7: Mid-platform transition (center of S) — Bird Keeper Rod at row 6
Rows 7-12: Lower platform segment (south arm of S) — Bird Keeper Abe at row 10
Rows 13-14: Open floor level — statues at x=3,y=13 and x=6,y=13; Gym Guide at x=7,y=13

npcs.name: Gym Guide
npcs.dialogue_pre_badge: The grass-type is weak against the flying-type. Keep this in mind. Believe in yourself!
npcs.dialogue_post_badge: Nice battle! Keep it up, and you'll be the Champ in no time at all!

trainers.name: Rod
trainers.seen_text: The keyword is guts! Those here are training night and day to become bird Pokemon masters. Come on!
trainers.after_battle_text: FALKNER's skills are for real! Don't get cocky just because you beat me!

trainers.name: Abe
trainers.seen_text: Let me see if you are good enough to face FALKNER!
trainers.after_battle_text: This is pathetic, losing to some rookie trainer...

gym_leader.name: Falkner
gym_leader.title: The Elegant Master of Flying Pokemon
gym_leader.intro_text: I'm FALKNER, the VIOLET POKEMON GYM leader! People say you can clip flying-type Pokemon's wings with a jolt of electricity... I won't allow such insults to bird Pokemon! I'll show you the real power of the magnificent bird Pokemon!
gym_leader.loss_text: ...Darn! My dad's cherished bird Pokemon... All right. Take this. It's the official POKEMON LEAGUE ZEPHYRBADGE.
badge_effects: Raises Attack stat of all Pokemon in party
Allows use of HM05 Flash outside of battle
gym_leader.tm_description: Reduces the enemy's accuracy while causing damage. Both defensive and offensive.
post_battle_script: Sets EVENT_BEAT_BIRD_KEEPER_ROD and EVENT_BEAT_BIRD_KEEPER_ABE (clears both trainers).
Triggers SPECIALCALL_ASSISTANT (Elm's aide phone call -> will give Mystery Egg at Pokemon Center).
After badge count check: may trigger GoldenrodRocketsScript or RadioTowerRocketsScript if applicable.

events.description: Falkner intro speech -> battle -> Zephyr Badge + TM31 Mud-Slap. Subsequent visits give post-battle monologue about challenging other gyms.
Before badge: standard challenge-accepted text. After badge: shows Falkner's name from GymStatue2Script.

Internal script VioletGymActivateRockets checks badge count. At 6 badges triggers GoldenrodRocketsScript; at 7 triggers RadioTowerRocketsScript. This is a story-progression hook for Team Rocket events.

layout_notes: S-shaped elevated platform: players must navigate stairs up/down to traverse the S-curve.
Lower entrance area is flat. Gym Guide stands at south near statues.
Bird Keeper Rod patrols the upper-right arm of the S. Line of sight faces left.
Bird Keeper Abe patrols the lower-left arm of the S. Line of sight faces right.
Falkner stands at the top (north) of the S on the highest platform.
Exit warps at y=15 (two tiles wide) lead back to Violet City warp id 2.
.blk file size: 40 bytes = 5 blocks wide x 8 blocks tall = 10x16 tiles (confirmed).
